source_trace: bitmap subplot montage generated by src/visualization/subfigure_montage.py
modification_scope: Composes five one-factor hyperparameter panels, one unnumbered legend panel, and three loss-ablation panels in a 3 x 3 unified montage.
plot_encoding: Each panel uses one hyperparameter as the x-axis; y-values are normalized to the canonical baseline.
loss_panel_policy: The third row contains square convergence panels for the joint, MAE-only and AFMAE-only loss objectives.

conclusions: Complete axes: H_UNITS, INNER_KAN_UNITS, INNER_KAN_LAYERS, GRID_SIZE, SPLINE_ORDER.

natural_frequency_drift.method: max(|max-median|, |median-min|) from band-limited fitted center frequency (comped)

linearity.method: mean(1 - R^2) across in-band frequency points

natural_frequency_drift_origin.method: max(|max-median|, |median-min|) from band-limited fitted center frequency (origin)

linearity_origin.method: mean(1 - R^2) across in-band frequency points
